headline: P&L exposure: ₹590 Cr capex (from article); no direct revenue at risk.
what_matters: No supply chain transmission; event is direct capex by Adani Power, not a supplier or downstream effect.
No immediate P/E compression; possible long-term risk of 0.05-0.1x P/E discount if ESG ratings deteriorate due to fossil fuel expansion.
Potential for bond spread widening or higher cost of capital (+20-40bps engine estimate) if ESG disclosures are not robust; opportunity to access green financing if aligned with EU Taxonomy.
action: Quantify exposure: ₹590 Cr capex (from article); no direct revenue at risk.
Revenue at risk: No direct revenue at risk; upside potential if capacity is efficiently utilized.
